problem_addressed: Developing AI models remains a heavily manual process that is challenging for non-AI experts, and existing agents are limited by static, outdated, and sparse parametric knowledge in their underlying LLMs.
core_claim: AIBuildAI-2, a knowledge-enhanced agent with an evolving hierarchical knowledge system, achieves expert-level performance in autonomous AI model development by dynamically loading relevant context and continuously improving from experience.
key_contributions: Hierarchical knowledge system organizing curated AI development documents into high-level instructions and low-level documents
Dynamic context loading mechanism that grounds decisions in verifiable expertise
Continual evolution of knowledge system through distillation of completed runs into structured takeaways
Superior performance on MLE-Bench (70.7% medal rate) and top-tier human expert performance in Kaggle competitions
novelty: Unlike prior work using static web-search retrieval (AIBuildAI) or static knowledge bases (MLEvolve), AIBuildAI-2 features a hierarchical, evolving knowledge system that continuously improves from agent experience and dynamically loads only relevant context for each task.
method_summary: AIBuildAI-2 initializes by collecting and organizing AI development documents into a hierarchical knowledge system, then dynamically loads relevant context for each AI task, grounds decisions in verifiable expertise, and continually evolves by distilling completed runs into structured knowledge updates.
method_components: Hierarchical knowledge organization with high-level instructions and low-level documents
Dynamic context loading based on current state and AI task
Knowledge distillation from completed runs into structured takeaways
External verification of expertise through curated documents
key_innovation: The evolving hierarchical knowledge system that continuously improves from agent experience by distilling completed runs into structured takeaways, addressing the static knowledge limitation of prior agents.
assumptions: Curated web documents provide sufficient initial knowledge for AI development
Distilling completed runs yields valuable structured knowledge updates
Dynamic context loading can effectively identify relevant expertise for each task
theoretical_grounding: No theoretical proofs or bounds are provided; evaluation relies entirely on empirical benchmarks and competition results.
headline_result: No specific numeric results provided in the text
improvement_over_baseline: No specific improvements quantified in the text
best_result: No specific numeric results provided in the text
title: AIBuildAI-2: Scalable Agentic AI Research and Engineering
